betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Beam Splitter Controller & Multiblock§f

§aBeam Splitters route a single particle beam into three outputs — one straight and two perpendicular.§f
The §bBeam Splitter Controller§f (`qmd:beam_splitter_controller`) is the brain of a §bBeam Splitter§f multiblock, used to fan a single incoming particle beam out into three directions (one straight-through, two 90° off-axis).

§6Controller Crafting Recipe§f:
Per the §bminecraft.crafting§f grid, the Beam Splitter Controller is crafted from:
- §bAdvanced Plating§f (`nuclearcraft:part:1`)
- §bSuper Alloy Ingot§f (`qmd:ingot_alloy:6`)
- §bAdvanced Processor§f (`qmd:semiconductor:5`)
- §bAccelerator Casing§f (`qmd:accelerator_casing`)

§6Beam Splitter Multiblock Structure (BeamSplitterLogic.java:78)§f:
- §bShape§f: a hollow rectangular accelerator multiblock (similar to Beam Diverter and LINAC).
- §bBeam ports§f: §bAccelerator Beam Ports§f on outer faces, including a straight-through axis and two perpendicular output axes.
- §bDipole magnets§f: corners and output faces must contain valid §bDipole§f magnets.
- §bQuadrupole yokes§f: §bAccelerator Electromagnet Yokes§f line the inner ring.
- §bPower & cooling§f: at least one §bAccelerator Energy Port§f and at least one §bAccelerator Cooler Vent§f.

§6Beam Routing Behavior (BeamSplitterLogic.java:380)§f:
When the multiblock is formed and powered:
- §bStraight output§f: the beam exits the straight-through face, with §bfocus loss§f (`Equations.focusLoss`) applied to the full path.
- §bPerpendicular outputs§f: the beam exits the two perpendicular faces, each with focus loss applied to the path.
- All three output streams share the same input intensity (no per-output attenuation, just per-path focus loss).

§6Component Supply Chain§f:
- §bAdvanced Processor§f → requires §bBasic Processor§f + Redstone + §bHafnium Oxide§f + §bP-Type Doped Silicon§f (see Q437 quest).
- §bSuper Alloy Ingot§f → mid-to-high tier alloy from §bNC Alloy Furnace§f.
- §bAdvanced Plating§f → from §bNC Manufactory§f.
- §bAccelerator Casing§f → from §bNC Manufactory§f.

§cWarning§f: A Beam Splitter missing dipoles in corners, missing energy port, or having no cooler vents will fail `isMachineWhole()` and refuse to form. The §bstraight-through path§f must remain unobstructed for the beam to exit cleanly.

§eTip§f: Use a §bBeam Splitter§f to fan a single high-energy beam into three independent Target Chambers — e.g. one for §bP-Type Doped Silicon§f production, one for §bStrontium-90§f transmutation, and one for an experiment you want to run in parallel. A Beam Splitter is more cost-effective than building three separate LINACs.
